other_observers: Seen with Van Truan, both days, also Vic Zerbi and others on first afternoon and several people on Thursday morning, including Duane Nelson, David Tonnessen, Jim Merritt, and others.
duration: an hour or more both days
description: Ceon Dexter and Brenda Wright found this bird the day before.  Van Truan and I made the long trip from Pueblo to Cortez to see it.  Smaller robin, then nearby robins.  Rufous back well seen, gray head.  Photos attached.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
